title: So Long Letty
writer: Scott Darling, Elmer Harris, Oliver Morosco
actors: T. Roy Barnes, Colleen Moore, Walter Hiers
plot: Harry Miller is a "natural-born mixer" while his wife Grace is a homebody, distressed by her husband's errant ways. Grace finds a kindred spirit in Tommy Robbins, who lives in an adjoining bungalow and whose wife Letty is devoted ...
